response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no recent or substantial C++ experience on Windows (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The bulk of recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang on web and data platforms, which does not align with the C++/Windows/finance profile required.
strengths: Solid software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and pairing experience
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a measurement IDE
Strong communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
C++ experience is minimal (~6 months, ~10 years ago) and not on a Windows enterprise stack
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle experience; database work is MongoDB/MySQL

key_factors.factor: Lack of recent C++ on Windows
No capital markets / fixed income domain
